video_prompt: The video shows a group of bees and wasps interacting with each other and a beehive. The bees are small with black and yellow stripes, while the wasps are larger with orange and black stripes. The video is shot in a realistic style, with a focus on the natural behavior of the insects. The background is a green leafy area with a wooden beehive. The video captures the movement and interaction of the bees and wasps, as well as the ambient sounds of the environment.
